# ContextMenu

Reveals a menu of actions on right-click or long-press.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/context-menu
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="context-menu"
  example={0}
  code={`<ContextMenu>
  <ContextMenu.Trigger>Right click here</ContextMenu.Trigger>
  <ContextMenu.Content>
    <ContextMenu.Item>Cut</ContextMenu.Item>
    <ContextMenu.Item>Copy</ContextMenu.Item>
    <ContextMenu.Separator />
    <ContextMenu.Item>Paste</ContextMenu.Item>
  </ContextMenu.Content>
</ContextMenu>`}
/>

```tsx
<ContextMenu>
  <ContextMenu.Trigger>Right click here</ContextMenu.Trigger>
  <ContextMenu.Content>
    <ContextMenu.Item>Cut</ContextMenu.Item>
    <ContextMenu.Item>Copy</ContextMenu.Item>
    <ContextMenu.Separator />
    <ContextMenu.Item>Paste</ContextMenu.Item>
  </ContextMenu.Content>
</ContextMenu>
```

## Props

### `<ContextMenu.Content>`

| Prop        | Type                  | Required | Default | Description                                                   |
| ----------- | --------------------- | -------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `container` | `HTMLElement \| null` | No       | -       | Override the portal container. Defaults to \`document.body\`. |

### `<ContextMenu.Item>`

| Prop    | Type      | Required | Default | Description                                                            |
| ------- | --------- | -------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `inset` | `boolean` | No       | -       | Reserves indicator space so the item aligns with checkbox/radio items. |

### `<ContextMenu.SubTrigger>`

| Prop    | Type      | Required | Default | Description |
| ------- | --------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `inset` | `boolean` | No       | -       | -           |

## Variants

| Variant | Values          |
| ------- | --------------- |
| `inset` | `true`, `false` |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/context-menu.json`
- Recipe: `contextMenu`
- Files: `src/components/ui/context-menu.tsx`
